summary: Iteration 115 - ALL TESTS PASSED. Google OAuth integration, callback error handling, guest header language selector, and dealer menu DE/FR translations verified successfully.

google_login_button.description: Google login button on /login is active and clickable with text 'Google ile devam et'

google_callback_route.description: Route /auth/google/callback exists and properly handles errors

google_callback_no_session.description: Callback without session_id shows appropriate error message
google_callback_no_session.error_displayed: Google oturum bilgisi alınamadı. Lütfen tekrar deneyin.

google_callback_invalid_session.description: Callback with invalid session_id shows appropriate error (401 from backend)
google_callback_invalid_session.error_displayed: Geçersiz veya süresi dolmuş Google oturumu

backend_google_exchange_endpoint.description: POST /api/auth/google/emergent/exchange endpoint exists and handles all scenarios correctly
tests_passed: Empty session_id returns 400 with 'Session ID zorunludur'
Invalid session_id returns 401 with error message

guest_header_language_selector.description: Language selector visible in guest header with TR/DE/FR buttons

dealer_menu_translation_de_fr.description: Dealer menu labels properly translated in DE and FR languages
dealer_menu_translation_de_fr.note: All menu items at top level and sub-levels are properly translated in DE and FR

context_for_next_testing_agent: All Google OAuth features tested and working. Dealer menu DE/FR translations fully functional. Guest header language selector working correctly. No issues found.
